title: I.O.C. Lifts Russia’s Olympic Suspension, Clearing the Way for 2028
summary_full: The International Olympic Committee “provisionally” removed the ban imposed in relation to Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. A previous ban for systematic doping had already ended.
summary_public: The International Olympic Committee “provisionally” removed the ban imposed in relation to Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. A previous ban for systematic doping had already ended.
